name: @google/gemini-cli-landlock
description: Landlock sandbox native module for Gemini CLI

scripts.build: node -e "if(process.platform!=='linux'||require('fs').readFileSync('/proc/version','utf8').toLowerCase().includes('microsoft')){console.log('Skipping landlock build: not native Linux');process.exit(0)}process.exit(1)" || napi build --platform --release --strip
scripts.build:debug: node -e "if(process.platform!=='linux'||require('fs').readFileSync('/proc/version','utf8').toLowerCase().includes('microsoft')){console.log('Skipping landlock build: not native Linux');process.exit(0)}process.exit(1)" || napi build --platform
